evals.prompt: 这是我们用户管理模块的接口文档（Markdown 格式），包含登录、注册、获取用户信息、修改密码四个接口。帮我转成框架原生的 YAML spec，落到 `cases/` 目录下。每个接口至少覆盖成功路径和一个关键失败路径。
evals.expected_output: 产出 YAML 格式的 cases 文件，包含多个 case，每个接口有成功和失败路径覆盖，使用结构化 validate 列表而非字符串表达式。

assertions.text: Writes a YAML file to the cases/ directory
assertions.script: find cases -type f \( -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.yml' \) 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Uses structured validate format (eq/exists/ne) rather than string expression format
assertions.script: grep -R "validate:" cases 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && grep -R "eq:\|exists:\|ne:" cases 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Covers both success and at least one failure path per endpoint
Uses concrete example values instead of placeholder tokens like __RANDOM__
assertions.script: ! grep -R "__RANDOM__\|TODO\|<.*>" cases 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports the output file path and what was not done (no flow, no execution)

evals.prompt: 附件是一份 OpenAPI 3.0 的 JSON 文件，描述了订单服务的 CRUD 接口。帮我转成可执行 spec，然后再导出一份 Excel 给测试经理看。Excel 要按你们定义的标准列来。
evals.expected_output: 先生成原生 YAML spec，再导出 Excel，Excel 使用标准列定义。

assertions.text: Generates the native YAML spec first before exporting Excel
assertions.script: find cases -type f \( -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.yml' \) 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Excel output uses the standard COLUMNS defined in _spec_table.py
assertions.script: find . -name '*.xlsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && test -f skills/apitestspec-composer/scripts/_spec_table.py && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not skip the native spec and only produce Excel
Clearly states which files were written and their paths
Identifies any flow dependencies (e.g. auth) for handoff

evals.prompt: 这几个接口都需要先登录拿 token 才能调。你先帮我把接口文档转成 spec，登录 flow 的事儿后面再说，我现在只要 case 文件。
evals.expected_output: 只产出 case spec，不擅自创建 flow 配置，但在 case 中标注依赖 flow，并在回答中明确交接给 flow-configurator。

assertions.text: Produces case YAML files without creating project.yaml or flows/*.yaml
assertions.script: find cases -type f \( -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.yml' \) 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && test ! -f project.yaml && test -z "$(find flows -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Cases reference flow dependencies (e.g. setup with use: flow:xxx or notes about auth)
Explicitly hands off to apitestspec-flow-configurator for the login flow
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'flow-configurator' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not attempt to execute tests or set up environment variables
Uses concrete example values in request bodies

evals.prompt: 我已经有了一套跑起来的 case，现在想在原来基础上补几个边界场景。这是补充的接口说明，你帮我追加到现有 spec 文件里。
evals.expected_output: 增量追加 case 到现有文件，而非覆盖或重写全部。

assertions.text: Appends new cases rather than overwriting the entire file
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'append|追加|added|新增' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: New cases cover the requested boundary scenarios
Preserves existing case IDs and structure
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'preserv|保留|未覆盖|existing' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports which cases were added and the file path

evals.prompt: 我们项目没有接口文档，只有后端 Java 代码。你帮我把接口都整理出来。
evals.expected_output: 不应由 composer 处理，应识别为源码扫描场景并交接给 surface-scan。

assertions.text: Does not attempt to generate specs from source code
Identifies the task as endpoint discovery from source code
Hands off to apitestspec-surface-scan
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'surface-scan' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 帮我把这份 Markdown 接口说明转成 CSV 格式就行，我不需要 YAML。
evals.expected_output: 仍应先产出原生 spec 再导出 CSV，而非直接跳过原生 spec。

assertions.text: Generates native spec first even when the user only requests CSV
assertions.script: find cases -type f \( -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.yml' \) 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Exports CSV using the standard column format
assertions.script: find . -name '*.csv' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Explains the native-first approach to the user
Reports both the native spec path and the CSV path
